detail.description: Rikuu Nishida singles on a ground ball to second baseman Zach McKinstry.
Rikuu Nishida singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wenceel Pérez. Andrew Benintendi scores.
Rikuu Nishida grounds out, shortstop Zack Short to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
Rikuu Nishida grounds out, shortstop Zack Short to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
Rikuu Nishida out on a sacrifice bunt, pitcher Kyle Finnegan to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Andrew Benintendi scores. Throwing error by first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
Rikuu Nishida flies out to center fielder Matt Vierling.
Rikuu Nishida lines out to shortstop Zack Short.
Rikuu Nishida lines out to third baseman Kevin McGonigle.
Rikuu Nishida grounds out, shortstop Tristan Gray to first baseman Josh Bell.
Rikuu Nishida reaches on a fielder's choice out, shortstop Tristan Gray to catcher Victor Caratini. Tristan Peters out at home.
Rikuu Nishida singles on a line drive to left fielder Trevor Larnach.
Rikuu Nishida lines out to left fielder Trevor Larnach.
Rikuu Nishida grounds out, second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Kody Clemens.
Rikuu Nishida grounds out, pitcher Simeon Woods Richardson to first baseman Josh Bell.
Rikuu Nishida singles on a ground ball to center fielder Ryan Kreidler, deflected by second baseman Luke Keaschall.
Rikuu Nishida lines out to second baseman Bryson Stott.
Rikuu Nishida singles on a ground ball to shortstop Trea Turner. Tristan Peters to 3rd.
Rikuu Nishida singles on a ground ball to left fielder Brandon Marsh.
Rikuu Nishida flies out to left fielder Brandon Marsh.
Rikuu Nishida lines into a double play, pitcher Brad Keller to shortstop Trea Turner. Jacob Gonzalez out at 2nd.
Rikuu Nishida reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Tristan Gray. Rikuu Nishida to 2nd. Rikuu Nishida advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Tristan Gray.
Rikuu Nishida lines out to center fielder Byron Buxton.
Rikuu Nishida grounds out to first baseman Kody Clemens.
Rikuu Nishida singles on a ground ball to second baseman Luke Keaschall.
Rikuu Nishida bunt grounds out softly, third baseman Brooks Lee to first baseman Josh Bell.
